model airplane assembler e swimming instructor 1/2 some projects small scale wind turbine design project/ university of southampton design and build a small-scale wind turbine to harness energy in an urban area. the skills needed for this project are both technical, such as researching, programming, cfd, solidworks, electronics and control, as well as project and business management, decision making, organisation and efficiency. social skills are also involved, like reporting, teamwork, liaising with experts, technicians and external companies. all coming together to deliver a sustainable and viable solution to such a relevant design problem. the effects of wavy leading edge wings on in-flight ice formation/ university of southampton traditional straight-wing designs are prone to ice accumulation, leading to reduce aerodynamic performance which can derive into unsafe and dangerous situations. it was studied whether sinusoidal leading-edge wings could offer a solution by disrupting the airflow and reducing the likelihood of ice formation, using cfd and fensap-ice and running aerodynamic simulations. this innovative design helps maintain optimal aerodynamic efficiency and enhances safety flights in icy conditions engineering product analysis project / university of southampton analysis of the ford mustang as a staple of the automotive industry from the microeconomic and business plan point of view. robotic project / university of southampton programmed, designed, and built a moving dinosaur-robot model that performed various tasks using a variation of c++ programming language in an arduino. aerospace science mission case study/ university of southampton case study on a planned-out research mission of a jupiter orbit explorer spacecraft. considering each step of the mission from the engineering standpoint such as fuel and power requirements as well as the actual design of the orbiter. race car rear wing model / university of southampton designed an efficient race car rear wing model and tested its aerodynamic properties using cfd. all work done using solidworks software. wind tunnel model / extended project qualification designed and built a wind tunnel model to aid visualization of air flow over an array of aerodynamic models. additional training mit online edx course in aerospace e risk assessment training solidworks certification
